last_substantive_baseline.title: Deploy demo backends and connect frontend API
last_substantive_baseline.claim_boundary: This baseline proves PR #46 was merged and its scoped demo-backend/API workflow and implementation are present on main. It does not prove workflow dispatch, current Azure inventory, scoped What-If, deployment, listener health, API health, frontend live rendering, report publication, or collector replacement.

repository_observation.head_semantics: PR #46 merge commit observed on main before opening this repository-state reconciliation increment
repository_observation.claim_boundary: This is a time-bounded repository observation made before this reconciliation pull request was opened. Resolve live main, pull requests, CI, and Azure state whenever this file is read.

authored_change.write_owner: This ChatGPT conversation — bounded repository-state reconciliation authorized by Anthony Edgar with 'Proceed'
authored_change.scope: Reconcile only .project/active-work.json and .project/handoffs/current-state.md to the observed merge of PR #46, the absence of open pull requests before branch creation, and the continuing absence of scoped demo deployment or verification evidence.
verification_criteria: the last substantive baseline records PR #46 and merge commit dcc4f75fc051484ba2f6ef633dc92ef80adae224
the repository observation records no open pull requests before this reconciliation branch was created
PR #46 is recorded as merged with exact-head CI run 29990625589 successful
the demo-backend/API workflow is recorded as present on main but not dispatched
Azure deployment, RBAC mutation, listener verification, API verification, and frontend live verification remain false
the final diff is limited to the two declared .project paths
authored_change.failure_behavior: Keep the reconciliation pull request draft, inspect project-state validation or scope failures, patch only the two declared paths, and do not dispatch any workflow or access or mutate Azure.
authored_change.rollback: Close the reconciliation pull request without merge or revert its repository commits. No Azure cleanup applies because this increment changes project state only.

bounded_authority_grants.authorization_source: Explicit user instruction after the read-only Azure planning boundary was stated
bounded_authority_grants.claim_boundary: This grant authorizes Azure reads and ProviderNoRbac planning only. It does not authorize the demo-backend/API workflow, deployment, collector changes, RBAC changes, report publication, guest commands, or any Azure mutation.

latest_scope_observation.interpretation: The run targeted the full collector-owning lifecycle scope rather than the demo-backend/API scope. It performed Azure login and reads but no Bicep deployment, backend deployment, API deployment, report deployment, or collector replacement.

proven: exact reviewed-commit checkout and bounded read-only authority validation succeeded
Azure OIDC login and current resource-group and collector inventory succeeded
no tagged report Storage account or visible collector publication role existed
What-If contained 21 Ignore and exactly four Create changes
the creates were one Storage account, one Blob service, one $web Blob-only container, and one Storage-scoped collector role assignment
zero Modify, Delete, and Replace changes were present
GitHub artifact digest and all 13 internal evidence-file hashes verified
no Azure mutation was authorized or performed
unproven: current Storage pricing, quota, and policy allowance
current collector identity and publisher availability at execution time
browser rendering and committed live frontend source

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This evidence applies to the separate public-report publication architecture and does not establish current demo-backend/API state. Fresh scoped Azure inventory and What-If are required before any demo deployment.

pr41_publication_execution_promotion.claim_boundary: Repository promotion is merged. No publication workflow execution, Azure deployment, RBAC mutation, managed-identity publication, Blob/browser proof, or manual repair is established.

pr44_publication_planner_repin.claim_boundary: Current planner evidence is machine-pinned. No publication workflow dispatch, Azure authentication for execution, permission grant, deployment, or browser proof is established.

pr45_publication_predeployment_readiness.claim_boundary: The read-only readiness workflow is present on main. It has not been dispatched and establishes no current readiness evidence or Azure authority.

pr46_demo_backends_api.claim_boundary: The repository implementation and scoped workflow are present on main. No scoped What-If, deployment, backend listener verification, API verification, frontend live rendering, or Azure mutation is established.

authority_defaults.rule: Repository-state reconciliation authority does not authorize workflow dispatch, Azure authentication, backend or API deployment, collector changes, report publication, or any Azure mutation. The separate historical publication-planner grant remains the only active bounded Azure-read exception.

live_state_resolution.repository_head: Query the live GitHub default branch at read time.
live_state_resolution.pull_requests: Query live PR head, draft state, mergeability, reviews, threads, and exact-head CI.
live_state_resolution.ci: Query workflow runs and jobs for the exact commit under evaluation.
live_state_resolution.azure: Use fresh scoped Azure inventory and What-If; repository declarations and the failed broad lifecycle run are insufficient.
